title: Enel’s Rule Becomes Clear
description: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Narrator. Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: There is nothing to talk about!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Everyone is grateful for the land.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: The citizens of the sky... Innocent....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you want peace, you must pay!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I cannot do such a thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: ASA is crying quite loudly over there...

summary: Wyper and the Shandia push harder against Enel’s forces while the Straw Hats struggle to navigate the battlefield.
